name: io.github.etanhey/brainlayer
title: BrainLayer
description: Persistent memory for AI agents — local-first semantic search, knowledge graph, and 12 MCP tools with ToolAnnotations. One SQLite file, no cloud, no API keys.

environmentVariables.name: BRAINLAYER_ENRICH_BACKEND
environmentVariables.description: LLM enrichment backend: groq, ollama, or mlx (auto-detected if omitted)

environmentVariables.name: GROQ_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Groq API key for cloud enrichment backend
